case_title: YBARRA RICKEY J VS RONDARIO PAULINE

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY YBARRA RICKEY J AS TO DEFENDANT RONDARIO PAULINE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-07-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 05
